name: Sister of Perpetual Anxiety
text:
Lifelink
Doomscroll (At the beginning of your upkeep, look at the top card of your library and feel vaguely worse. You may put it into your graveyard; if you do, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock and draw a card.)
Whenever a doom counter is put on the Doomsday Clock, you gain 1 life. Her dread is, somehow, nourishing.
flavorText: She has read every omen, twice, and bookmarked the worst ones.
